notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich singles on a ground ball to center fielder Henry Bolte. Luis Rengifo to 3rd. Christian Yelich to 2nd. Christian Yelich advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler lines out to left fielder Jackson Chourio.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds out, third baseman Luis Rengifo to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Christian Yelich GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Zack Gelof to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Joey Ortiz out at 2nd. Christian Yelich out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Mark Leiter Jr. Luis Rengifo scores. Christian Yelich to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Zack Gelof to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. Brice Turang out at 1st.
